name: project-mri-workspace
description: project-mri — the static marketing site (root: html/css/ts) and the Next.js dashboard (apps/dashboard) alongside the Python package in src/

scripts.preview:cf: pnpm run site:bundle && pnpm dlx wrangler@4 dev
scripts.deploy:preview: pnpm run site:bundle && pnpm dlx wrangler@4 deploy --env preview
scripts.deploy: pnpm run site:bundle && pnpm dlx wrangler@4 deploy --env production
scripts.types:api: python -m mri.cli openapi -o openapi.json && pnpm --filter @mri/dashboard types:api
